findings.message: `IN-02` requires `bin/sotp track type-signals` itself to skip missing catalogues and exit zero, but the implementation plan for T003 says the user-facing `sotp track type-signals` path must remain strict while only the gate-path invocation becomes lenient. These two artifacts define opposite behavior for the direct command, so implementers cannot satisfy both the spec and plan as written.

`OS-01` declares source-code changes out of scope, but T003 requires changing `apps/cli-composition/src/track/tddd.rs` to implement the review-gate fix. Because this is a combined track where the second ADR necessarily needs a CLI source change, the out-of-scope item currently conflicts with the implementation plan unless it is scoped explicitly to the CI-cache work only.
